message:
feat(model): introduce ConversationPacket canonical contract

Adds src/model/conversation_packet.rs (671 lines) plus the pub mod line
in src/model/mod.rs. Establishes the "normalize once, fan out many"
contract for refresh and rebuild pipelines:

  CONVERSATION_PACKET_VERSION = 1

  enum ConversationPacketBuilder { RawConnectorScan, CanonicalReplay }
  enum ConversationPacketVersionStatus { Current, Mismatch { expected,
                                         observed } }

  struct ConversationPacket { canonical payload + sink projections }

The owned canonical payload (NormalizedConversation, Message,
Snippet) is kept separate from sink-specific projections (lexical,
analytics, semantic) so a single packet can be passed to multiple
downstream writers without re-running normalization or duplicating
message text in every derived structure.

No call-sites yet — this is the type contract only. Follow-up beads
will switch the refresh/rebuild writers over to consume packets
instead of re-normalizing inside each sink.
